description: Run the full documented validation cycle for Diagnostic Trio after feature completion, fix any issues uncovered, and record final verification status for both the Rust host and Python reasoning layers.

userStories.title: Run Rust formatting and lint validation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the Rust host layer checked with the repo's normal formatting and lint workflow so release readiness is not based on tests alone.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `cargo fmt --check` from the repository root
Run `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` from the repository root
Fix any Rust formatting or lint issues discovered during validation
Document the Rust validation commands and outcomes in `progress.txt`
All Rust formatting and lint commands pass

userStories.title: Run Rust build and test validation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the Rust workspace build and test surfaces verified so host execution changes are fully validated.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `cargo check` from the repository root
Run `cargo test` from the repository root
Fix any Rust build or test failures discovered during validation
Document the Rust build and test outcomes in `progress.txt`
All Rust build and test commands pass

userStories.title: Run Python environment, typecheck, and test validation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the Python reasoning layer validated with the repo's documented environment and checks so the reasoning package remains shippable.
acceptanceCriteria: Use the documented virtual environment workflow for `trio-reason/`, creating `/tmp/trio-venv` if needed
Install the Python package in editable dev mode with `pip install -e ".[dev]"` from `trio-reason/`
Run `mypy trio_reason tests` from `trio-reason/`
Run `pytest` from `trio-reason/`
Fix any Python packaging, typecheck, or test failures discovered during validation
Document the Python environment and command outcomes in `progress.txt`
All Python validation commands pass

userStories.title: Document final validation status and reusable workflow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the final validation pass recorded clearly so future Ralph iterations can repeat the same release-readiness workflow without rediscovering it.
acceptanceCriteria: Append a final validation summary to `progress.txt` including the commands run, pass or fail results, and any fixes applied
Update the `Codebase Patterns` section in `progress.txt` if reusable validation workflow knowledge was discovered
Update nearby `AGENTS.md` or `CLAUDE.md` files only if genuinely reusable validation guidance was learned
Mark each validation story complete in the PRD only after its required commands pass
The repository contains a reviewable record of the completed validation cycle
